Validates tool provider execution policy input.

## Import

```ts
import { validateToolProviderExecutionPolicy } from "@graphrefly/ts/orchestration";
```

## Signature

```ts
function validateToolProviderExecutionPolicy(policy: unknown): readonly DataIssue[]
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `policy` | `unknown` | Policy object used to admit, retry, or route work. |

## Returns

Validation diagnostics or the validated projection.
